name: grok-augment
description: Use Grok CLI and Grok video as non-mutating research, critique, creative, divergence, video-brief, and MP4 generation layers for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Add Grok research, critique, creative, and video generation to Codex.
interface.longDescription: Grok Augment lets Codex call the local Grok CLI as an external non-mutating layer for current research, independent critique, creative direction, divergent options, and Grok-video-only asset briefs. It can also generate a real MP4 through a configured Grok-compatible /v1/videos endpoint. Codex remains the local executor: file edits, tests, verification, and commits stay in Codex. The plugin intentionally fails when Grok is unavailable instead of falling back to another provider.
defaultPrompt: Use node --experimental-strip-types scripts/grok_augment.ts inspect --json to verify the local Grok CLI before relying on it.
Use node --experimental-strip-types scripts/grok_augment.ts research, critic, creative, video, or diverge when Grok should augment Codex without mutating files.
Do not use fallback providers: image assets remain image_gen, video assets remain Grok video, and unavailable Grok access must be reported as a failure.
